programme.title: Planet Earth: Life
programme.desc: The world's most diverse animal group, insects possess fearsome weapons but also show tenderness.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Life
programme.desc: An investigation of marine invertebrates and the way they thrive in the toughest parts of the ocean; divers swim into a shoal of predatory Humboldt squid as the creatures emerge from the depths to hunt in packs.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Life
programme.desc: Time-lapse photography reveals all the drama of the plant world, unable to be seen by the naked eye.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Life
programme.desc: Primates are intelligent, capable of problem-solving, communicating and social interaction.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Navy lawyers defend two Marines accused of killing a private at the naval station at Guantánamo Bay, Cuba.

programme.title: Stripes
programme.desc: A lazy New York cabby (Bill Murray) quits his job and convinces his bored buddy (Harold Ramis) they should join the Army.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: February 2nd keeps repeating for a cynical TV weatherman (Bill Murray) sent to watch the groundhog in Punxsutawney, Pa.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The All-American Girls Professional Baseball League begins in 1943 with a major-league has-been as a manager.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: A recent college graduate lands a job working for a famous and diabolical editor of a New York fashion magazine.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Dinozzo's father (Robert Wagner) returns and plays an important role in a murder investigation.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team must protect Ziva's father when his attendance at a convention leads to surprises.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Following a deadly attack, one member of the team reminisces.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Naval petty officer and sole witness in an upcoming murder trial disappears.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team partners with a Coast Guard Investigative Service agent to solve the murder of a Marine on a dinner boat.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Dr. Mallard's predecessor, Dr. Magnus, joins the team to help solve a murder at a college fair.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats
programme.desc: A giant kelp forest hosts a diverse marine ecology in Monterey Bay, Calif., balanced by the sea otter.

programme.title: Stripes
programme.desc: A lazy New York cabby (Bill Murray) quits his job and convinces his bored buddy (Harold Ramis) they should join the Army.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: February 2nd keeps repeating for a cynical TV weatherman (Bill Murray) sent to watch the groundhog in Punxsutawney, Pa.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The All-American Girls Professional Baseball League begins in 1943 with a major-league has-been as a manager.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: A recent college graduate lands a job working for a famous and diabolical editor of a New York fashion magazine.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A teen model's death leads Briscoe and Curtis to her parents in Baltimore; there they enlist detectives Munch and Falsone. (Concluding on

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a new mother's death and the disappearance of her baby, leading prosecutors to probe the husband's role in the affair.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bail bondsman's death leads detectives to a corrupt lawyer with a connection to the district attorney's office.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A killer's confession prompts detectives to reopen a deadly arson case involving a family with ties to Schiff.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A visiting doctor, thought to be a terrorist, becomes a suspect in the death of an Egyptian man; Ross learns the doctor specializes in female circumcision.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An accident that kills three people hits close to home for Curtis and brings back painful memories for McCoy.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A forensic specialist is targeted by killers, challenging Briscoe and Curtis to find a suspect; McCoy and Ross turn up evidence on the victim.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives search for the killer of a physician who had a dangerous sex life; an attorney maintains murders are a result of too much television.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives seek a motive for a man's brutal beating; Ross uncovers an unlikely accomplice in the assault case.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives link a dead FBI witness to an overeager hit man and a gangster; Schiff pushes to prosecute the mob for the murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The stabbing death of a psychologist draws Detectives Briscoe and Curtis into a heated divorce case and pits McCoy and Ross against a manipulative attorney.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A girl's death at a party provides a puzzle for Briscoe and Curtis; McCoy and Ross work around the margins of law.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives try to find out what happened to a woman who was found unconscious at the bottom of her apartment stairs.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: The Faulkner Focus
programme.desc: Emmy-winning journalist Harris Faulkner provides the latest news with insightful analysis and interviews with top newsmakers.

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Four female panelists and one male colleague share their perspectives on the day's top news stories.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum brings the story of the times with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis;

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham aims to cut through the Washington chatter to speak directly with unexpected voices and the actual people who are impacted by the news of the day.

programme.title: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

programme.title: Fox News at Night
programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: FOX & Friends First
programme.desc: Hosts Todd Piro and Carley Shimkus present all the headlines viewers may have missed overnight, along with a preview of upcoming news events.

programme.title: Unsettled: Climate Change's Real Story
programme.desc: An investigation into science, economics, and narratives driving today's climate debate. Viewers are challenged to consider what is known, what remains uncertain, and why open inquiry matters.

programme.title: First Edition
programme.desc: The host presents a round-up of the latest social, political and economic news updates and developments from across the country.

programme.title: National Update
programme.desc: Live national headlines, expert interviews and insight into the stories shaping America.

programme.title: John Bachman Now
programme.desc: John Bachman tackles big news from DC, NY and around America.

programme.title: National Desk
programme.desc: Bringing breaking news, investigative reports, and political coverage.

programme.title: Newswire
programme.desc: Up-to-the-minute news updates, in-depth analysis, exclusive interviews and a fresh perspective on the day's top stories and key developments in breaking news, politics and current events.

programme.title: Ike Wingate America
programme.desc: Ike Wingate is a straight shooter who takes the complex stories of the day and lays them out logically and sensibly, making sense of the news.

programme.title: The Todd Starnes Show
programme.desc: Todd Starnes delivers breaking news and commentary covering politics, faith, and culture.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: The Leventhal Report
programme.desc: Rick Leventhal delivers comprehensive analysis and interviews on current affairs and significant events from home and abroad.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: America's Mayor Live
programme.desc: Former NY Mayor Rudy Giuliani gives insight on leadership, courage and the most pressing issues of our time.

programme.title: The Freedom File: Judge Napolitano
programme.desc: Judge Napolitano provides commentary on current events, drawing on his expertise in constitutional law to protect individual freedoms.

programme.title: Rob Carson's What in the World?
programme.desc: Rob Carson dissects politics, cultural phenomena and the absurdity confronting America with humor and satire.

programme.title: The Trump Wars
programme.desc: Donald Trump faces a field of 17 political heavyweights and becomes the unlikely winner of the 2016 GOP nomination for President.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: The Leventhal Report
programme.desc: Rick Leventhal delivers comprehensive analysis and interviews on current affairs and significant events from home and abroad.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: Coolidge: Rediscovering an American President
programme.desc: Exploring the life and legacy of America's 30th president, Calvin Coolidge, who oversaw a great period of prosperity and cut taxes while reducing federal debt.

programme.title: Voices of Valor
programme.desc: Carl Higbie sits down with three fellow veterans to discuss topics like the failures of the VA, how weak American society has become, and the difficulties veterans face when returning to civilian life.

programme.title: Battlefield Mysteries
programme.desc: A return to the battlefields above Europe to reveal the legend of the Intruders.

programme.title: Battlefield Mysteries
programme.desc: In 1939, Fascists in Spain attempt to get rid of any traces of their rivals, which includes thousands of international volunteers.

programme.title: Michael Savage: Savage Nation
programme.desc: Michael Savage delivers his insights on politics, culture, faith and more as he seeks to save western civilization.

programme.desc: Rob Carson dissects politics, cultural phenomena and the absurdity confronting America with humor and satire.

programme.title: White House Usher: The Inside Story
programme.desc: White House Usher Chris Emery served under Presidents Reagan, Bush and Clinton; he saw it all; discover the secret lives of the First Families.

programme.title: The Dean Martin Celebrity Roast: Evel Knievel
programme.desc: Dean Martin hosts a celebrity roast of daredevil Evel Knievel.

programme.title: The Hitler Home Movies
programme.desc: Secluded deep in the Bavarian Alps, Hitler, his family and closest allies hid away, issuing orders for armies across Europe while they relaxed, dined and enjoyed an otherworldly peace.

programme.title: Josef Mengele: Hunting a Nazi Criminal
programme.desc: He was one of the most notorious Nazi war criminals, infamous for his deadly experiments on twins. But at the end of WWII, he simply disappeared. Despite a global manhunt by Mossad and the allies, he would die a free man, 34 years later, in Brazil.

programme.title: Wake Up America Early
programme.desc: Presents news delivering key facts, expert insights, and in-depth analysis to kickstart your day.

programme.title: Wake Up America
programme.desc: Starting the day with real news and analysis.

programme.desc: Your source for up-to-the-minute breaking news; the ideal way to stay informed with eye-opening coverage that makes sense of the stories that affect our lives every day.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop escalates into a life-or-death confrontation.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: In this intense episode, the series delves into a critical moment where an officer must make a rapid decision in a chaotic situation.

programme.title: Daybreak
programme.desc: Join hosts Steve and Ivie Gruber as they get your day started.

programme.title: American Sunrise
programme.desc: Morning news with the Real America's Voice team live from West Palm Beach, Florida.

programme.title: The War Room
programme.desc: Steve Bannon and the team brings important news from around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you constantly deal with stress? Our circumstances may not change, but how we react to them can; Joyce discusses dealing with stress God's way.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: How each of Jesus Christ's titles brings a unique blessing; Dr. Jeremiah explains what it means that Jesus is seated on His heavenly throne.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: See Jesus in the Old Testament through types, shadows and Bible stories explained.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Advice for success in life from the book of Proverbs.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Where are you placing your trust? Today, Joyce explains how faith, gratitude and relying on God can change your everyday life.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; Creflo and his wife Taffi share their vision for everyone to understand God's love and promises.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Joel and Victoria Osteen's message of unconditional love and unending hope reaches everyone across the world.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Pastor Steven Furtick at Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., gives inspirational messages.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Living in a world with moral restraints lifted, Christians must gain situational awareness to survive and thrive; this requires understanding the culture, spiritual temperature of the nation, and individual circumstances to know what to do.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Where are you placing your trust? Today, Joyce explains how faith, gratitude and relying on God can change your everyday life.

programme.title: Better Together
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh, Faith Eury Cho, Irene Rollins, Debra Fileta, and Alexandra Hoover discuss the root causes of anger and how to find healing.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Amazing stories of people who have experienced God's blessings.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: How each of Jesus Christ's titles brings a unique blessing; Dr. Jeremiah explains what it means that Jesus is seated on His heavenly throne.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Pastor Steven Furtick at Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., gives inspirational messages.

programme.title: Harvest With Pastor Greg Laurie
programme.desc: Join Pastor Greg Laurie for a time of encouragement, worship and Bible study.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: See Jesus in the Old Testament through types, shadows and Bible stories explained.

programme.title: Charlie Kirk Today
programme.desc: Join Charlie Kirk as he breaks down the news, challenges the mainstream narrative and delivers commentary on faith, culture and politics; no spin, no censorship, just the truth.

programme.title: Allen Jackson NOW
programme.desc: A lifeline for a struggling and anxious nation; a guiding hand for those who are not ready to give up, and for those who want to find a way past the negativity before things get worse; searching for the wisdom embedded in a Christian World View.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Featuring the contemporary Christian music and worship, ministry voices, interviews from a wide variety of guests and an hour of relevant talk.

programme.title: The Rosenberg Report
programme.desc: Joel C. Rosenberg is a respected geopolitical expert on the Middle East. Each week, he offers a close-up view of current events and issues in this volatile region, bringing important insights and biblical perspective.

programme.title: My First Trip to Israel
programme.desc: The Mount of Beatitudes as the Galileans would have experienced; Chaim Malespin meets Sheila at the Church of Beatitudes in Capernaum.

programme.desc: Featuring the contemporary Christian music and worship, ministry voices, interviews from a wide variety of guests and an hour of relevant talk.

programme.title: Charlie Kirk Today
programme.desc: Join Charlie Kirk as he breaks down the news, challenges the mainstream narrative and delivers commentary on faith, culture and politics; no spin, no censorship, just the truth.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: While we cannot know the day or hour of Christ's return, we can know it's close by the signs given in the Bible. God's Word not only tells us approximately when Jesus will return; it also tells us how. Part 1 of 2.

programme.title: The Rosenberg Report
programme.desc: Joel C. Rosenberg is a respected geopolitical expert on the Middle East. Each week, he offers a close-up view of current events and issues in this volatile region, bringing important insights and biblical perspective.

programme.title: Stories of Purpose & Hope
programme.desc: Lynda Lane welcomes authors Vanya Koepke and Sherree Bowen to share how God used their personal pain and challenges as launching pads for providing hope to others through their new books.

programme.title: Life Today
programme.desc: In a new documentary, an investigative journalist reveals his findings while telling the stories of supernatural encounters.

programme.title: Taking Care of Business
programme.desc: Addressing the social issues of the day.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: In Empty Out the Negative, Joel Osteen provides us with biblical tools to combat negative thoughts and feelings that weigh us down so that we can have the abundant life that we were meant to live.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you stressed as you wait for something to change? Today, Joyce discusses ways to calm down as you wait for the change only God can bring.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.desc: Advice for success in life from the book of Proverbs.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Trying to do everything on your own? Today, Joyce shares practical ways to trust God more and stop living frustrated and worn out.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; Creflo and his wife Taffi share their vision for everyone to understand God's love and promises.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: What does it mean to live with a faith-filled function? In this powerful message, pastor Matt Hagee teaches from Ephesians 1:19-23, showing how the church was formed by God, filled with His Spirit and created to function in unity and power.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: How to stop feeding doubt and start feeding your faith.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Pathway to Victory is the broadcast ministry of Dr. Robert Jeffress and the First Baptist Church of Dallas, Texas. The bold and practical Bible teaching of Pastor Jeffress pierces the darkness with the light of God's Word.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Trying to do everything on your own? Today, Joyce shares practical ways to trust God more and stop living frustrated and worn out.

programme.desc: Patagonia, a wilderness at the south of the Americas; pumas hunt in snowy mountains, rockhopper penguins brave the waves, giant stag beetles climb trees, orcas learn to hunt and elephant seals fight for dominance -- plus new pop-up fun facts.
